common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: [For BR Shop Only] Use this API to get shop KYC registration and qualification information.

request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description:
Type of the shop’s tax ID. Applicable values: 

1: Personal seller (CPF)
2: Company seller (CNPJ)
children.name: tax_id_type

children.description:
The shop’s tax ID.
- When tax_id_type = 1 (Personal seller), it is CPF.

- When tax_id_type = 2 (Company seller), it is CNPJ.
children.name: tax_id

children.description: CPF number of the individual seller. Valid only when tax_id_type = 1.
children.name: cpf_id

children.description: CNPJ number of the company seller. Valid only when tax_id_type = 2.
children.name: cnpj_id

children.description: Full name of the individual seller. Valid only when tax_id_type = 1.
children.name: name

children.description: Legal name of the company seller. Valid only when tax_id_type = 2.
children.name: legal_entity_name

children.description: Birthday of the individual seller (stored as Unix timestamp). Valid only when tax_id_type = 1.
children.name: birthday

children.description: Birthday of the individual seller (formatted as YYYY-MM-DD). Valid only when tax_id_type = 1.
children.name: birthday_str

children.description: State registration number of the shop.
children.name: state_registration

children.description: Shop’s billing address details.
children.name: billing_address

children.description: State of the billing address.
children.name: state

children.description: City of the billing address.
children.name: city

children.description: Specific detail of the billing address.
children.name: address

children.description: ZIP code of the billing address.
children.name: zipcode

children.description: Neighborhood of the billing address.
children.name: neighborhood

children.description:
Status of the shop’s current KYC onboarding process. Applicable values:

0: None
1: Regis Processing

2: Regis Validated

3: Regis Rejected

4: KYC Pending
5: KYC Processing
6: KYC Processing Manually
7: KYC Validated
8: KYC Rejected
children.name: onboarding_status

children.description: Timestamp when the onboarding information was submitted.
children.name: submission_time

children.description: Nationality of the individual seller. Valid only when tax_id_type=1.
children.name: nationality

children.description: Main CNAE code.
children.name: cnae_main

children.description: Secondary CNAE code.
children.name: cnae_secondary

children.description:
MEI verification result. Applicable values:

0: No
1: Yes
children.name: mei_check

children.description: Indicate if the shop has passed KYC verification.
children.name: onboarding_passed

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/shop/get_br_shop_onboarding_info?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

response.cnae_main: 47.51-2-01 - Comércio varejista especializado de equipamentos e suprimentos de informática
cnae_secondary: 47.89-0-99 - Comércio varejista de outros produtos não especificados anteriormente
45.30-7-03 - Comércio a varejo de peças e acessórios novos para veículos automotores
47.57-1-00 - Comércio varejista especializado de peças e acessórios para aparelhos eletroeletrônicos para uso doméstico, exceto informática e comunicação
47.52-1-00 - Comércio varejista especializado de equipamentos de telefonia e comunicação
47.81-4-00 - Comércio varejista de artigos do vestuário e acessórios
45.41-2-06 - Comércio a varejo de peças e acessórios novos para motocicletas e motonetas
47.63-6-03 - Comércio varejista de bicicletas e triciclos; peças e acessórios
47.54-7-03 - Comércio varejista de artigos de iluminação
47.82-2-02 - Comércio varejista de artigos de viagem

47.83-1-01 - Comércio varejista de artigos de joalheria
